news.title: Americans’ Shifting Views on Energy Issues
news.summary_en: The share of Republicans who say the country should prioritize oil, coal and natural gas over wind and solar power has doubled to 71% over the last six years.

news.title: How Americans view Trump’s handling of trade and tariffs
news.summary_en: Nearly six-in-ten U.S. adults are not confident that Trump can make good decisions about trade policy. Views of trade between the U.S. and China, Canada and Mexico have shifted since 2025.
